ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polymers" (
  "polymer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polymer */,
  "polymer_name" TEXT /* Name of the polymer */,
  "polymer_smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the polymer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the polymer */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the polymer */,
  "glass_transition_temperature" REAL /* Glass transition temperature of the polymer */,
  "crystallinity" REAL /* Crystallinity of the polymer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polymer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solvents" (
  "solvent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solvent */,
  "solvent_name" TEXT /* Name of the solvent */,
  "solvent_smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the solvent */,
  "density_g_ml" REAL /* Density of the solvent */,
  "boiling_point_c" REAL /* Boiling point of the solvent */,
  "surface_tension_mn_m" REAL /* Surface tension of the solvent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solvent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membranes" (
  "membrane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membrane */,
  "polymer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polymer used in the membrane */,
  "solvent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solvent used in the membrane */,
  "contact_angle" REAL /* Contact angle of the membrane */,
  "thickness_um" REAL /* Thickness of the membrane in um */,
  "solvent_solubility_parameter_Mpa_sqrt" REAL /* Solvent solubility parameter of the membrane in Mpa sqrt */,
  "xw_wt_percent" REAL /* Weight percentage of the solvent in the membrane */,
  "temp_C" REAL /* Temperature of the membrane in C */,
  "permeate_pressure_mbar" REAL /* Permeate pressure of the membrane in mbar */,
  "j_total_flux_kg_m_2h_1" REAL /* Total flux of the membrane in kg/m^2h */,
  "a_separation_factor_wo" REAL /* Separation factor of the membrane without water */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the membrane was created */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date the membrane was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membrane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membranes_polymer_id FOREIGN KEY ("polymer_id") REFERENCES polymers ("polymer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membranes_solvent_id FOREIGN KEY ("solvent_id") REFERENCES solvents ("solvent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "augmented_smiles" (
  "augmented_smiles_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each augmented SMILES */,
  "membrane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membrane the augmented SMILES belongs to */,
  "augmented_smiles" TEXT /* Augmented SMILES of the membrane */,
  "augmentation_method" TEXT /* Method used to generate the augmented SMILES */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("augmented_smiles_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_augmented_smiles_membrane_id FOREIGN KEY ("membrane_id") REFERENCES membranes ("membrane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membrane_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "membrane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membrane the performance belongs to */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Performance metric (e.g., permeability, selectivity) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membrane_performance_membrane_id FOREIGN KEY ("membrane_id") REFERENCES membranes ("membrane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membrane_experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "membrane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membrane the experiment belongs to */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., gas separation, water treatment) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membrane_experiments_membrane_id FOREIGN KEY ("membrane_id") REFERENCES membranes ("membrane_id")
)
